steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The “but” announces a reversal: while Greek/Roman sculpture is sometimes characterized as idealizing, the passage reveals that many sculptures actually depict people in a different way. The blank must express the opposite of idealization.

steps.title: Match the contrasting concept
steps.content:
”Unflattering” directly opposes idealization: idealization makes things look good, while unflattering makes them look bad.

The other three choices (superficial, imprecise, implausible) don't establish this contrast between favorable and unfavorable depiction.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
